basics.name: Stephen G. Traiforos
basics.label: Fullstack Software Engineer
basics.summary: Passionate full stack engineer seeking a highly collaborative team environment with a variety of architectures and technical challenges. Self driven developer with a proven track record of providing innovative solutions while leading by example through a thoughtful understanding of the customer experience, business priorities, and market opportunity.

work.name: Nymbl Systems
highlights: Led the migration of key application components from AngularJS to Angular 16
Collaborated on establishing code style and standards for a multi-module TypeScript application
Mentored in Angular best practices within an enterprise environment
Designed and implemented Java lambda PDF generator for AI medical documentation
Maintained and created PDF autopopulation for billing and medical necessity claims in Spring Boot with validation and error handling
Directed a team of frontend engineers, enhancing architecture and functionality, while leveraging team strengths and effectively allocating resources

work.name: Traiforce Group LLC
highlights: Maintained various React applications, generated diagrams and documents for cross pollination and handoff
Guided and learned with others, utilizing React ecosystem experience, enabling others to do their best work
Collaborated with colleagues to implement micro frontend applications
Spanned the application and platform stack to guide contract based development for rapid iteration
Member of an agile team supporting major software platform functionality, working as an individual contributor

work.name: Triverus Consulting LLC
highlights: Member of an agile team supporting major software projects for clients, working as an individual contributor and fulfilling team lead roles

Extended an established Java based near real time reporting architecture for ELearning platform deployed in AWS. Integrated serverless, microservice and monolithic application components to support xAPI launch verbs
Optimized React.JS/.Net Core Entity Framework based healthcare platform resulting in 50% page load time reduction through the separation of database and business logic layers

Automated 40+ business processes into an enterprise class application for a state government agency. Collaborated with government statisticians, reducing average process execution time from 3 months to 2 minutes

work.name: Kuebix LLC
highlights: Implemented batch processing for bulk shipping rate quotes within Java Spring Boot environment
Developed Salesforce API extension taking advantage of remote action calls
SCRUM master, mitigating impediments to story completion, ensuring stakeholder feedback is incorporated appropriately

education.area: BS Computer Science; Software Engineering, Security focus
